parameters.content:
## MA — Resubmit VendHub (PLACEHOLDER)

POST /webhook/ma-resubmit-vendhub

Stub workflow — replies 501 until the Modern Amenities team provides the VendHub API host, auth scheme, and account provisioning endpoint.

TODO when credentials arrive:
1. Swap the stub `HTTP Request` node with a real `POST /api/v1/accounts` (or equivalent) using a stored VendHub credential.
2. Update the Student Onboarding record to store `VendHub Account ID` (add field to Airtable first).
3. Resolve the linked error record.

string.name: message
string.value: VendHub integration not yet configured. Provide API host + credentials to complete.
